Our mission at Navya Global is to promot: Our mission at Navya Global is to promote holistic wellness and the ancient science of Ayurveda. By staying true to ancient wisdom while embracing modern scientific advancements, we ensure the highest quality and efficacy of our offerings.
We understand the significance of purity: We understand the significance of purity in Ayurvedic preparations. Our team of experts works tirelessly to source the finest herbs, botanicals, and minerals from pristine environments, ensuring that they are free from any harmful additives or chemicals. Each of our products is made with 100% natural herbs and is vegan. They undergo rigorous testing to meet international quality standards to deliver unparalleled results without compromising on safety.
Navya Global offers a diverse range of A: Navya Global offers a diverse range of Ayurvedic products designed to cater to various health needs. From traditional herbal supplements to our products are thoughtfully crafted too. At the moment our product range covers hair care.
At Navya Global, we are more than just a: At Navya Global, we are more than just a brand; we are a community driven by a passion for well-being. Our Ayurvedic experts, herbalists, and customer care professionals are always available to provide personalized guidance and support. We believe in building lasting relationships with our customers by offering exceptional service and fostering an environment of trust and transparency.
We invite you to embark on a journey to: We invite you to embark on a journey to holistic well-being with us. Explore the richness of Ayurveda, discover the transformative power of natural remedies, and experience the harmony that comes from aligning with the wisdom of ancient traditions.

Magics Hair Care is an Ayurvedic shampoo: Magics Hair Care is an Ayurvedic shampoo mix powder crafted to promote hair growth, control hair fall, and remove dandruff. It is chemical-free, vegan, and suitable for all hair types and ages. The price is ₹299.
How do I use Magics Hair Care shampoo mi: How do I use Magics Hair Care shampoo mix powder?
To use Magics Hair Care, mix the shampoo: To use Magics Hair Care, mix the shampoo powder to create a paste. Apply it to wet hair, massage gently, and rinse thoroughly. For best results, use regularly.
Is Magics Hair Care suitable for all hai: Is Magics Hair Care suitable for all hair types?
Yes, Magics Hair Care is suitable for al: Yes, Magics Hair Care is suitable for all hair types and can be used by men, women, and children of all ages.
Are there any chemicals in Magics Hair C: Are there any chemicals in Magics Hair Care?
No, Magics Hair Care is completely chemi: No, Magics Hair Care is completely chemical-free. It is made with pure, natural ingredients and is vegan and Ayurvedic.
How often should I use Magics Hair Care?: How often should I use Magics Hair Care?
For best results, use Magics Hair Care 3: For best results, use Magics Hair Care 3-4 times a week. Regular use will help improve hair health and appearance.
Can Magics Hair Care help with dandruff?: Can Magics Hair Care help with dandruff?
Yes, Magics Hair Care is effective in re: Yes, Magics Hair Care is effective in removing dandruff and keeping your scalp healthy and clean.

Magics Hair Care is crafted by Ayurvedic: Magics Hair Care is crafted by Ayurvedic experts in London and manufactured in India, combining ancient wisdom with modern innovation.
Can I use Magics Hair Care if I have sen: Can I use Magics Hair Care if I have sensitive skin?
Yes, Magics Hair Care is safe to use on: Yes, Magics Hair Care is safe to use on coloured and chemically treated hair. Our gentle, chemical-free formula helps maintain hair health without stripping colour or causing damage.
How long will it take to see results wit: How long will it take to see results with Magics Hair Care?
Results may vary depending on individual: Results may vary depending on individual hair conditions, but many users start noticing improvements in hair texture, shine, and growth within one month of regular use.
Can I use other hair products with Magic: Can I use other hair products with Magics Hair Care?
Yes, you can use other hair products wit: Yes, you can use other hair products with Magics Hair Care. However, for best results, we recommend minimizing the use of chemical-laden products.

We offer a return policy for unopened an: We offer a return policy for unopened and unused products within 30 days of purchase. Please refer to our return policy on the website for more details.
